examples.title: Basic phone input
examples.description: Country selector plus national number with E.164 emission.
examples.code:
{#if phone}

E.164: {phone}

{/if}

examples.title: Country switching
examples.description: Narrowed country allow-list — typed digits reformat when the user switches countries.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PhoneInput, type PhoneInputCountryCode } from '@lostgradient/cinder/phone-input';

  const countries: readonly PhoneInputCountryCode[] = ['US', 'CA', 'GB', 'DE', 'FR'];
  let phone = $state('');
  let country = $state<PhoneInputCountryCode>('GB');
</script>

<PhoneInput
  id="country-switching-phone"
  bind:value={phone}
  bind:country
  {countries}
  label="Phone number"
  description="Numbers reformat as you switch country."
/>

examples.title: With error message
examples.description: Error state surfaces a message and marks both controls invalid.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { PhoneInput } from '@lostgradient/cinder/phone-input';
  let phone = $state('555');
</script>

<PhoneInput
  id="error-phone"
  bind:value={phone}
  label="Phone number"
  error="Enter a complete phone number."
/>
